message:
🐛 Bump memory limit from 512Mi to 1Gi

Console was OOMKilled on pok-prod after ~5min during startup health
probes across multiple clusters. Increase limit to 1Gi and request
to 256Mi.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -54,10 +54,10 @@ route:
 resources:
   limits:
     cpu: 500m
-    memory: 512Mi
+    memory: 1Gi
   requests:
     cpu: 100m
-    memory: 128Mi
+    memory: 256Mi
 
 # GitHub OAuth configuration
 github:
